hotel_name: NGÔI LÀNG CỔ 77 HOÀNG DIỆU (NGOI LANG CO 77 HOANG DIEU)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The room is quite small (I stayed in a deluxe room), and it feels quite humid, so it’s not very comfortable (I needed to borrow a fan to make the room more pleasant even though the fan is cold. :))), the bed is quite small (around 6x8). Breakfast is at facility 1 (about 1 - 1.5km away). The staff is enthusiastic and friendly. The classic design and interior are quite interesting.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Helpful staff. Nice entrance and yard. Pokey room. Noisy because of grates, woken by other guests. Lots of places to eat and drink nearby.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Nice place and good value but too close to the street. Too loud

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text: Nice theme honestay, same operation management as Saphir Hote. Staffs are exceptional in maintaining the garden (sweeping leaves every few hours). No AC or fan but given Da Lat weather, its alright. Rooms are quite small and slightly sinking towards the bed head, possibly due to the age of the buildings.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The accommodation is quite close to the center, with a spacious and beautiful environment. The room is clean, and the staff is friendly and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Beautiful little cloister!
reviews.text: I love the layout and antique decorations, there was no fan or AC tho

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is quite cold, the floor is also cold, the home decor is cute like a fairy tale, hot water is ready in 2-3 minutes, and early check-in support is cheap. Arrived at 7 am but according to AGD regulations, check-in is at 2 pm and only charged 170k.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The scenery is beautiful, close to the center which is convenient for travel. The staff is friendly, but the room has a slight odor upon entering, but it goes away after a few minutes, so it's acceptable!!!

reviews.title: A very beautiful house.
reviews.text: Because he values beauty, the living experience is certainly not as good as a hotel. The hot water takes a long time to come on, and you have to wait for a while. The house is not fully enclosed; there are hollow openings for aesthetics and ventilation, which may let in some insects. If you're unlucky, bees might come in, but the issue isn't very serious because it is really beautiful. I recommend staying here; the owner is also very nice, kind, and dedicated.

reviews.title: Incredible accommodation.
reviews.text: The house is in French style and looks great in photos. At night, my dad would bring warm sweet bread with soy milk, and the guy is really nice!

reviews.title: Should experience!
reviews.text: The management and staff are very nice! The garden is lovely! Attentive service: there is always warm soy milk for guests every evening! We have been three times and always want to come back!

reviews.title: Cute room
reviews.text: But be careful of mosquitoes, close the windows tightly in the evening to prevent heat. If there is a little one (2 years old) accompanying, the bed might be a bit small.

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: Just posted a clip where everyone thinks I'm in the EU. The homestay is beautiful, the bed is comfortable with soft pillows, hot water is stable, each room has seating in front of the yard, and there are plenty of food options within the area, so you can just order food and enjoy sitting in front of the yard, it's already a lot of fun.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The best for hotel

reviews.title: Wonderful experience at the Ancient Village 77 Hoang Dieu.
reviews.text:
I have personally experienced and objectively evaluated:
- Classic, fairy-tale-like beautiful scenery both inside and outside.
- Clean and fragrant.
- Attentive staff.
- Worth the money.
* Note: My room did not have a closet. For hangers, fans, kitchen, and cooking utensils, please contact the reception.

reviews.title: Super cute, super lovely, super friendly staff.
reviews.text: I really love this place, everyone! It's so beautiful, everything is perfect.

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: The room is clean, fragrant, and everything is tidy. The staff and owner are very nice and polite. It's a bit disappointing that the hot water faucet varies from weak to strong while showering. Overall, it's a wonderful place to stay, I will definitely come back and recommend it to my friends and family.

reviews.title: The ancient village
reviews.text: The room is clean and beautiful, just like in the picture. In the evening, you can borrow items to cook downstairs.

reviews.title: Very Good
reviews.text: 10 Điểm

reviews.title: Very Good
reviews.text: Đẹp, cổ kính và yên bình

reviews.title: I really like it!
reviews.text: The staff is very friendly, the prices are reasonable, the hotel is fully equipped with high-end amenities, and it's very close to the city center for convenient transportation.

reviews.title: 潮湿的古堡
reviews.text: 员工服务很好，入住两晚第二天没有清洁房间，房间很潮湿

reviews.title: 大叻非常漂亮的酒店
reviews.text: 酒店修得非常法式，童话风。老板人很好，服务非常棒，从胡志明坐过夜大巴过来，因为有空房，老板早上六点就给我们办了入住，非常nice

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Phòng thấp, chăn drap giường có mùi mốc

reviews.title: sẽ không quay lại
reviews.text: phòng rất ồn, không có cách âm, nghe tiếng xe chạy rất rõ. chủ nhà cũng không thân thiện =(

reviews.title: Not good
reviews.text: Bước chân vào phòng sộc mùi ẩm mốc. Muỗi. Ko cách âm. Phòng trên đi lại ầm ầm, nói thì thầm cũng nghe thấy. Nhân viên thì nice cho tới khi check out. Cái khăn mặt bị dơ bắt khách đền. 100k/ cái. 2 cái 200k. Ủa? Khăn ko phải để cho khách dùng à? Nói chung là ko okie.

reviews.title: Vị trí
reviews.text: Không oke cho lắm bãi đỗ xe không rộng rãi

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Khách sạn ko dọn phòng cho khách , mặc dù đã có yêu cầu , khách hỏi sao ko dọn thì đỗ lỗi khách là khách ko dặn
Lễ tân buổi đêm , định ăn gian tiền khách , nhà mình đi 2 bé, 1 bé 2 tuổi , 1 bé 3 tuổi , là dc free ( chính sách ks ) mah nói mình là sẽ phải thu tiền 1 bé , và dc free chỉ 1 bé ( nhà mình đi tới 7phong , mỗi phòng dc free 1 bé ), mình nghi ngờ vì thu tiền mah ko có hoá đơn , mình nói cho mình xem hoá đơn , thì bạn nhân viên lưỡng lự và đưa ra chính sách ks và ko hề có chuyện ks thu tiền em bé . ks nên xem xet lại các vấn đề tư ý thu thêm tiền khách. mah ko có các hoá đơn của ks

reviews.title: Cần thay đổi tác phong phục vụ
reviews.text: Giữ cccd gắn chip của khách sau khi đã chụp hình trong khi quy định của nhà nước là chỉ được photo và trả lại. Có bạn nhân viên nam trẻ hỗ trợ kém, có bạn nhân viên nữ nhiệt tình

reviews.title: Rất tốt
reviews.text: Phòng sạch sẽ, đẹp, cổ đúng nghĩa, bồn tắm rất cưng nha. Có điều cửa sổ 1 cái ko có rèm phải dùng áo che lại mới yên tâm sử dụng. Còn lại tốt. Sẽ quay lại khi ở ĐL

reviews.title: 法式鄉村建築
reviews.text: 環境清幽 適合喜歡安靜的人

reviews.title: Lovely staff and villa
reviews.text: Super friendly staffs and lovely villa. Everyday wakes up from a colorful dream and open window to encounter another dream.  Outside is main road with rush traffic though, inner is quite peaceful and quiet at night.
